candidate_summary: Shared B_0 RoPE fundamental band across all heads (drone anchor) + per-head overtone B_k slightly-more-than-octave (2.1, 4.2, 6.3) + per-token dup rhythmic gate g_t {drone, dup-overtone} + circular-breathing M-token drone-fundamental shadow-KV preload + syncopation period-4 token-position bias on dup-gate.
content_words: continuous drone shared B_0 fundamental RoPE band all-head
per-head overtone B_k octave-plus interval allocation 2.1-4.2-6.3
dup rhythmic gate token-level drone-or-overtone switching
circular-breathing pre-loaded shadow-KV drone-token cache + syncopation period-4 bias

results.name: Channel-Band RoPE Scaling Quantized
results.rationale: Channel-band RoPE shares spectral-band allocation but lacks shared-fundamental/per-head overtone split + dup gate + shadow-KV preload.

results.name: LongRoPE NTK-By-Parts Per-Dimension
results.rationale: Per-dimension NTK rescaling; no shared B_0 drone + no per-head 2.1/4.2/6.3 overtone allocation.

results.name: MLA Decoupled-RoPE Shared-Key
results.rationale: Shared decoupled RoPE key weakly parallels drone-anchor; no overtone bands + no dup gate.

results.name: ShadowKV KV Cache Shadows
results.rationale: Shadow-KV offloads/reconstructs KV; not preloaded drone-fundamental + lacks band split.

results.name: Entropy-Guided KV Caching MDPI 2025
results.rationale: Entropy-guided eviction orthogonal to spectral allocation.

results.name: StreamingLLM Attention Sinks
results.rationale: Attention sinks act as persistent anchors loosely analogous to drone shadow-KV; no RoPE-band fundamental/overtone.

results.name: Frequency Bands in RoPE ICLR 2026
results.rationale: Analyzes RoPE frequency bands per head; no shared-B_0 drone + slightly-more-than-octave 2.1/4.2/6.3 overtones + no rhythmic dup gate.

results.name: Mixed-Frequency RoPE EliteKV
results.rationale: Mixed-frequency RoPE for KV compression overlaps on per-head frequency mixing; lacks shared fundamental drone + octave-plus overtone spacing + token-level gate.

decision_rationale: No prior art reaches kw>=2 / sem>=0.7 / func>=0.7; shared B_0 drone + per-head octave-plus overtones + dup rhythmic gate + circular-breathing shadow-KV + syncopation period-4 bias appears novel combination. NOTE: primary scored 8 hits at sem 0.78-0.90 / func 0.78-0.92 on frequency-band RoPE + shadow-KV adjacencies; verdict-level disagreement flagged.
